strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map
Recent hands-on work with agentic AI infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
concerns: AI expertise is effectively two months old (April 2025 to present) — no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership prior to current role

Zero evidence of director-level strategic influence: no record of advising strategic customers/partners, shaping product roadmaps at organizational scale, or inspiring cross-organizational initiatives
Education is undergraduate-only (BS Computer Science, Fine Arts) — no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field as preferred, and no compensating publication or research record
response.justification: The role's two non-negotiable competencies are recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products/platforms and director-level strategic influence over customers and partners. Against AI expertise, the résumé provides one data point: MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq, started April 2025 — roughly two months of AI-specific work with no prior signal. Against strategic influence, there is no evidence of advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud/AI adoption at organizational scale, or external thought leadership beyond a single 2019 conference talk on a niche GIS project. The candidate is a strong senior/staff-level individual contributor with genuine breadth and an entrepreneurial streak (GISCollective), but the seniority gap between their current trajectory and the principal/director IC bar this role demands is substantial. The score of 3 reflects that the experience volume is present but the AI strategy competency — the core differentiator — is almost entirely absent.
